name: Triple Chocolate Strip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease two cookie sheets lightly with butter or cooking spray.
3. Sift flour into a bowl; level off with the back of a knife.
4. In a medium bowl, combine sifted flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
5. In a large bowl, beat sugar and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
6. Add margarine to the sugar mixture and beat until smooth.
7. Incorporate eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
8. Gradually mix in the flour mixture until just combined.
9. Stir in chocolate chips.
10. Divide dough into four equal portions.
11. Shape each portion into a 12 x 1-1/2 inch roll.
12. Place two rolls about 2 inches apart on prepared cookie sheets.
13. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 14 to 18 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out almost clean.
14. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks for 10 minutes.
15. Cut each roll into 1-inch wide strips.
16. Makes 4 dozen cookies.
NOTE: For glazing, melt 2 ounces of white chocolate or semi-sweet chocolate with 1/2 teaspoon margarine together and drizzle over the cooled cookies before slicing.
